Common_Genes: miR156 (microRNA156; regulatory small RNA targeting SPL transcription factors; overexpression via Pro35S:MIR156 increased anthocyanin ~4-fold; target mimicry via Pro35S:MIM156 reduced anthocyanin to ~1/10 of wild type and increased flavonols 1.6-2.9-fold; Arabidopsis thaliana)
Pathway_Genes: DFR (Dihydroflavonol 4-reductase; At5g42800; first dedicated enzyme for anthocyanin biosynthesis converting dihydroflavonols to leucoanthocyanidins; transcript >30-fold increased in Pro35S:MIR156 and decreased in Pro35S:MIM156; direct target of SPL9 confirmed by ChIP and DEX-inducible system; ProDFR:GUS reporter mimicked anthocyanin accumulation pattern; SPL9 binding to promoter regions I and II containing GTAC boxes; GTAC box mutation did not alter expression suggesting indirect SPL9 recruitment; Arabidopsis thaliana)
ANS (Anthocyanidin synthase; anthocyanin biosynthetic gene; expression increased in Pro35S:MIR156 and decreased in Pro35S:MIM156 stems by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
F3'H (Flavonoid 3'-hydroxylase; catalyzes conversion of dihydrokaempferol to dihydroquercetin; expression increased in Pro35S:MIR156 and decreased in Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
UGT75C1 (UDP-glucosyl transferase 75C1; anthocyanin biosynthetic gene; expression increased in Pro35S:MIR156 and decreased in Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
UGT78D2 (UDP-glucosyl transferase 78D2; anthocyanin biosynthetic gene; transcript level remained unchanged in both Pro35S:MIR156 and Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
CHS (Chalcone synthase; early flavonoid biosynthetic gene; transcript levels higher in Pro35S:MIM156 and lower in Pro35S:MIR156 compared to wild type by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
CHI (Chalcone isomerase; early flavonoid biosynthetic gene; transcript levels higher in Pro35S:MIM156 and lower in Pro35S:MIR156 compared to wild type by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)

FLS1 (Flavonol synthase 1; At5g08640; major flavonol synthase converting dihydroflavonols to flavonols; expression not greatly changed in Pro35S:MIR156 or Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; not affected by DEX-induced SPL9 activation; Arabidopsis thaliana)
FLS3 (Flavonol synthase 3; minor flavonol synthase; expression not greatly changed in Pro35S:MIR156 or Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
PAL1 (Phenylalanine ammonia lyase 1; early phenylpropanoid pathway enzyme; expression slightly increased in both Pro35S:MIR156 and Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
Regulation_Genes: SPL9 (SQUAMOSA PROMOTER BINDING PROTEIN-LIKE 9; At2g42200; miR156-targeted transcription factor; primary subject of study; negatively regulates anthocyanin biosynthesis; overexpression decreased anthocyanin at stem-rosette junction; expression increases acropetally along stem inversely to DFR; directly binds DFR promoter regions I and II by ChIP with anti-GFP in ProSPL9:GFP-rSPL9 line; DEX-induced rSPL9-GR activation reduced DFR transcripts by 60% within 6h in presence of CHX confirming direct regulation; physically interacts with PAP1 via R2R3 domain demonstrated by yeast two-hybrid, BiFC (split-luciferase), and CoIP; competes with TT8 for binding to PAP1 thereby destabilizing MYB-bHLH-WD40 complex shown by BiFC competition assay; acts as bifunctional transcription factor - activator for flowering genes but repressor for anthocyanin genes; Arabidopsis thaliana)

SPL15 (SQUAMOSA PROMOTER BINDING PROTEIN-LIKE 15; SPL9 subfamily member; expression increases acropetally along stem opposite to DFR pattern by qRT-PCR; spl9-4 spl15-1 double mutant did not show increased anthocyanin suggesting functional redundancy with other SPLs; Arabidopsis thaliana)

SPL3 (SQUAMOSA PROMOTER BINDING PROTEIN-LIKE 3; At2g33810; spl3-1 mutant showed same anthocyanin as wild-type Ws; overexpression did not decrease anthocyanin; expression did not notably change along stem; plays minor role if any in anthocyanin regulation; Arabidopsis thaliana)
SPL10 (SQUAMOSA PROMOTER BINDING PROTEIN-LIKE 10; SPL9 subfamily member; overexpression decreased anthocyanin accumulation at stem-rosette junction; Arabidopsis thaliana)
SPL4 (SQUAMOSA PROMOTER BINDING PROTEIN-LIKE 4; SPL3 subfamily member; expression did not notably change along the stem by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)

PAP1 (PRODUCTION OF ANTHOCYANIN PIGMENTS 1; MYB75; At1g56650; R2R3 MYB transcription factor; component of MYB-bHLH-WD40 complex activating anthocyanin biosynthetic genes; physically interacts with SPL9 via R2R3 domain in yeast two-hybrid, BiFC, and CoIP; also interacts with TT8; SPL9 competes with TT8 for PAP1 binding; pap1-migs knockdown suppressed anthocyanin in Pro35S:MIR156 background; transcript moderately increased in Pro35S:MIR156; Arabidopsis thaliana)

TT8 (TRANSPARENT TESTA 8; bHLH transcription factor; component of MYB-bHLH-WD40 complex; interacts with PAP1 in yeast two-hybrid and BiFC; SPL9 competes with TT8 for PAP1 binding demonstrated by BiFC competition assay; tt8-1 mutation partially reduced anthocyanin in Pro35S:MIR156 background due to redundancy with GL3/EGL3; transcript moderately increased in Pro35S:MIR156; Arabidopsis thaliana)

TTG1 (TRANSPARENT TESTA GLABRA 1; WD40 repeat protein; component of MYB-bHLH-WD40 complex; ttg1-1 mutation completely suppressed anthocyanin accumulation in Pro35S:MIR156 inflorescences; Arabidopsis thaliana)
MYB113 (R2R3 MYB transcription factor; interacts with SPL9 in yeast two-hybrid assay (Supplemental Figure 5); transcript moderately increased in Pro35S:MIR156; Arabidopsis thaliana)
PAP2 (PRODUCTION OF ANTHOCYANIN PIGMENTS 2; MYB transcription factor; transcript not dramatically changed in Pro35S:MIM156 but moderately increased in Pro35S:MIR156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)

TT2 (TRANSPARENT TESTA 2; MYB transcription factor; transcript increased in Pro35S:MIR156 and decreased in Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; no direct interaction with SPL9 detected in yeast two-hybrid; Arabidopsis thaliana)

MYB12 (R2R3 MYB transcription factor; positive regulator of early flavonoid genes CHS/CHI/F3H/FLS1; expression greatly decreased in Pro35S:MIR156 stems by qRT-PCR; likely explains reduced CHS and CHI in Pro35S:MIR156; Arabidopsis thaliana)
MYB111 (R2R3 MYB transcription factor; positive regulator of early flavonoid genes; expression greatly decreased in Pro35S:MIR156 stems by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
MYB11 (R2R3 MYB transcription factor; positive regulator of early flavonoid genes; expression analyzed by qRT-PCR in Figure 3B; Arabidopsis thaliana)
GL3 (GLABROUS 3; bHLH transcription factor; redundant with TT8 and EGL3; no significant expression change in Pro35S:MIR156 or Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
EGL3 (ENHANCER OF GLABRA 3; bHLH transcription factor; redundant with TT8 and GL3; no significant expression change in Pro35S:MIR156 or Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
MYBL2 (R3-MYB related protein; repressor of MYB-bHLH-WD40 complex; no significant expression change in Pro35S:MIR156 or Pro35S:MIM156 by qRT-PCR; Arabidopsis thaliana)
GL1 (GLABROUS 1; MYB transcription factor for trichome initiation; tested for interaction with SPL9 in yeast two-hybrid - no direct interaction detected; Arabidopsis thaliana)
Title: Negative Regulation of Anthocyanin Biosynthesis in Arabidopsis by a miR156-Targeted SPL Transcription Factor
